headline: After A Massive Rally, The Easy Money May Be Gone - Prologis
summary: Prologis, Inc. is rated a Hold as valuation has risen to 27.6x forward AFFO, reflecting recent optimism. Learn more about PLD stock here.

headline: W.P. Carey Announces Dividend Hike: Is the Increase Sustainable?
summary: WPC hikes its dividend to 93 cents per share, marking its seventh increase since resetting payouts in 2023 as it leans on stable leases and high occupancy.
